issues.description: Missing type filter constraint: action must target only {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type cards, not all own characters/leaders
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — text states 'during this turn' which indicates active turn scope

Second effect is completely wrong: should implement conditional blocker denial when selected card attacks, not DrawCard. Text requires: 'if the selected card attacks during this turn, your opponent cannot activate [Blocker]'
Trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. Should be 'OnAttack' tied to the selected card attacking, with condition checking if that card is the one selected by PowerBoost effect

suggestedDsl.effectText: Select up to 1 of your {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type Leader or Character cards and that card gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, if the selected card attacks during this turn, your opponent cannot activate [Blocker].

target.typeFilter: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
